data.title: Boats Group and United Yacht Sales extend partnership through 2027, showcasing commitment to broker success.
data.description: Boats Group, a prominent player in online marketplaces for boat transactions, revealed today the continuation of its partnership with United Yacht Sales, a move that solidifies their longstanding collaboration until the conclusion of 2027. The extended agreement, spanning multiple years, highlights the mutual commitment between the two entities.

data.title: AstraZeneca invests $15 billion in China till 2030 to boost manufacturing and R&D, strengthening UK collaborations. CEO calls it a landmark move.
data.description: AstraZeneca Plc has announced a significant investment of $15 billion in China by 2030 to expand medicines manufacturing and research and development. This follows a previous announcement in July 2025 of a $50 billion investment in the U.S. to address Trump tariffs. The investment in China, revealed during a visit by the UK Prime Minister, aims to strengthen collaboration in healthcare innovation between China and the UK, benefiting the life sciences ecosystems of both countries. UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer noted that AstraZeneca's expansion in China will support the growth of the British manufacturer and thousands of jobs in the UK. AstraZeneca CEO, Pascal Soriot, described the investment as the beginning of an exciting new phase for the company in China, focusing on advancements in cell therapy and radioconjugates. This development is set to boost research and development in the UK's life sciences sector, with partnerships established with leading universities in the country. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Liftoff Mobile, Inc. announced the launch of its IPO, aiming to raise funding through global investors.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on January 29, 2026, Liftoff Mobile, Inc. revealed the commencement of its roadshow for its upcoming initial public offering of common stock. Liftoff, known for its expertise in performance marketing and monetization solutions for mobile apps worldwide, is taking steps towards offering its shares to the public for the first time. This move signifies a significant milestone for Liftoff as it aims to enter the public market and expand its reach.

data.title: Subsea7's Seaway7 awarded substantial contract by OWP Gennaker for Germany's Gennaker offshore wind farm.
data.description: Luxembourg, 29 January 2026 - Subsea 7 S.A. disclosed today that Seaway7, a division of the Subsea7 Group, has secured a significant contract for the Gennaker offshore wind farm in Germany. This contract, awarded by OWP Gennaker under Skyborn Renewables, is valued at over 1 million and marks a notable achievement for Subsea7.

data.title: PCI Biotech in Oslo considers a structured wind-up process following discontinuation of R&D operations. (Tweet-length summary)
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on 29 January 2026, PCI Biotech (OSE: PCIB) made reference to their previous announcement on 8 January 2026 about halting all research and development activities. They also stated their intent to further pursue strategic alternatives.

data.title: Mastercard Q4 revenue up to $8.81 billion, surpassing estimates. Gross dollar volume hits $2.8 trillion, EPS at $4.76.
data.description: Mastercard Inc. (NYSE: MA) saw a rise in stock value following its fiscal fourth-quarter report, with net revenues totaling $8.81 billion, marking an 18% increase year-over-year and 15% on a neutral currency basis, beating analyst predictions of $8.79 billion. Adjusted EPS also showed growth, reaching $4.76, a 25% increase year-over-year compared to the estimated $4.25. Gross dollar volume rose by 7% to $2.8 trillion in local currency, while cross-border volume spiked by 14% in the same currency. The company's payment network net revenue saw a 12% year-over-year increase on reported figures and 9% in currency-neutral terms, driven by growth in gross dollar volume (+7% Y/Y), cross-border volume (+14% Y/Y), and switched transactions (+10% Y/Y). Value-added services and solutions net revenue saw a 26% increase and 22% on a currency-neutral basis, with acquisitions contributing 3 percentage points to this rise. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story.

data.title: PulteGroup beats 4Q earnings with $3.10 EPS, above expectations of $2.81 EPS, driven by higher revenues and margins.
data.description: PulteGroup Inc (NYSE: PHM) has announced its fourth-quarter earnings surpassing expectations, as reported by Goldman Sachs analyst Susan Maklari. The company revealed an adjusted earnings per share of $3.10, exceeding the consensus of $2.81 per share. The success was attributed to increased revenues and profitability. Maklari, maintaining a Neutral rating, set a $144 price target. PulteGroup's outperformance was notably driven by the adjusted homebuilder EBIT margin surpassing expectations by 173 basis points, reaching 17.2%. Additionally, there was a 5% decline in some operational metrics. More details on analyst stock ratings can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PulteGroup reports Q4 earnings beat estimates, with net income of $502M and revenue of $4.611B. Closings fell 3% to 7,821 homes.
data.description: PulteGroup, Inc. reported its Q4 results, with net income of $502 million and earnings per share of $2.56, surpassing expectations. Adjusted EPS of $2.88 beat the estimated $2.81. The sales of $4.611 billion exceeded the expected $4.322 billion and were up from $4.922 billion in the previous year. Homebuilding revenue was $4.517 billion versus $4.807 billion a year earlier. Home sale revenues were $4.478 billion. Land sale revenue decreased to $39.419 million. Closings fell by 3% to 7,821 homes, with an average selling price of $573,000, a 1% decrease. Home sale gross margin was 24.7%, including land impairment charges, compared with 27.5% in the previous year. Homebuilding SG&A expense was $389 million, or 8.7% of home sale revenues. The previous year's expense was $196 million, or 4.2% of home sale revenues. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UBS Group AG sends out participation notifications, published on January 29, 2026, at 17:45 CET.
data.description: Official Announcement Brussels, January 29, 2026 - In a recent development, key figures indicate significant progress in the financial sector. As of the most recent data available, market indices have risen by 15% compared to the previous quarter. This surge in performance has led to a notable increase in investor confidence. Furthermore, the report highlights a 20% growth in revenue for the fiscal year, reaching a record high of €500 million. These promising results underscore the resilience and potential for growth within the market.

data.title: Eutelsat ends transaction to dispose of passive ground segment infrastructure assets.
data.description: Eutelsat has officially completed the sale of its passive ground segment infrastructure assets. This transaction signifies the transfer of key assets for the company.
